overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a misty rocky canyon environment. The character passes a squad of stormtroopers and continues toward a natural rock archway, with the camera briefly tilting up to reveal the narrow sky between towering cliff walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon path with tropical vegetation

events.description: character walks past a squad of stormtroopers standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon toward the misty distance, passing enemy patrol

notable_agents.action: squad of stormtroopers in white armor standing on the path, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
tall vertical rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
uneven stone pathway winding through the canyon floor
green ferns and plants growing along the base of the cliff walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon with towering rock walls on both sides. A squad of stormtroopers stands on the right path, which the character passes by. The path is lined with tropical vegetation and leads into a misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper canyon section with atmospheric mist

agents.ego_description: continuing through the misty canyon, flanked by tall rock walls on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the canyon where the atmosphere becomes mistier. The rock walls feel closer and more imposing as the path continues forward through the hazy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon walls viewed from below

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the sky visible between the towering canyon walls
camera tilts back down to resume the follow view behind the character

agents.ego_description: character pauses to look up at the narrow strip of sky visible between the cliff walls

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the sky visible through the narrow gap between the canyon walls, emphasizing the height and scale of the rock formations. After a moment, the camera returns to the follow position behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon approach to natural rock archway

events.description: large natural rock arch becomes visible ahead, spanning the canyon width

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the massive natural rock arch that spans the canyon ahead

entered.detail: large natural stone arch spanning the width of the canyon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a massive natural rock arch comes into view ahead, spanning the entire width of the canyon. The path leads directly toward this geological formation as the canyon walls continue to tower on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, misty canyon that gradually reveals the immense scale of the surrounding rock formations. It begins with the character walking past a squad of stormtroopers stationed along a path lined with tropical vegetation. As the character proceeds deeper into the canyon, the atmosphere becomes increasingly hazy and the towering rock walls feel more imposing. The camera then tilts upward to reveal the sliver of sky visible through the narrow gap between the cliffs before returning to follow the character forward. Finally, the path opens up as a massive natural rock arch comes into view, spanning the entire width of the canyon.
